where.if: AND id NOT IN (SELECT plan_freebie_id from tb_pmb_plan_freebie_list WHERE plan_list_id = #{planId})

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_plan_freebie (title, content, display_yn, create_id, modified_id) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{displayYn}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_freebie SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, display_yn = #{displayYn}, modified_date = NOW(), modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.sql: a.id ,a.plan_list_id ,b.plan_name as planName ,a.plan_freebie_id ,a.order_no ,c.title as freebieTitle ,c.content as freebieContent ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_freebie_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_freebie c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_freebie_id = c.id

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_freebie_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_freebie c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_freebie_id = c.id AND a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_plan_freebie_list (plan_list_id, plan_freebie_id,order_no,create_id, modified_id) VALUES ( #{planListId}, #{planfreebieId}, #{orderNo}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_freebie_list SET plan_list_id = #{planListId}, plan_freebie_id = #{planfreebieId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, modified_date = NOW(), modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_freebie_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_freebie c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_freebie_id = c.id
ORDER BY id
